name: Spontaneous breast expansion
description:
One day, while walking down the street, your breasts begin to expand!

Mostly made for myself as many of the current breast expansion content on the website is parasite based which I don't quite enjoy. There is no defined reason as to why User's breasts are expanding, this can be up to your discretion.

My first bot, I tested it a bunch and it seems to be fine for the most part, but is very open ended.

Image source: https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/130215286
creator: brechnev
